message:
feat(inference): add galaxy-brain mode mathematical display

Full math transparency for Bayesian inference: renders priors,
likelihoods, Bayes factors, posteriors, and log-odds in terminal-
friendly notation. Three verbosity levels (summary/detail/full) with
Unicode and ASCII fallback modes. 8 tests.

Closes: process_triage-wme

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
